title: Limit Dashboard Selection to One at a Time in Metrics Analyst
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to select only one dashboard at a time for analysis, so that the system processes accurately within Service 1 limitations and multi-dashboard analysis is reserved as a premium feature.
description:
The Metrics Analyst should restrict dashboard selection to one at a time. This is both a technical limitation of Service 1 (which processes one dashboard at a time) and a business decision to make multi-dashboard processing a premium paid feature.

If a user tries to select a second dashboard, an alert message should appear: 'You can add only 1 dashboards'. A server-side validation was also added as a secondary guard against frontend bypass.
acceptance_criteria: Only one dashboard can be selected at a time
Attempting to select a second dashboard shows an alert message
Server-side validation enforces the single-dashboard limit
The analyze button works correctly with a single selection
ux_changes: Restricted dashboard selection to one at a time. Shows an alert message when a user attempts to select a second dashboard.
middleware_changes: Added server-side validation to enforce the single-dashboard selection limit, preventing frontend bypass.
implementation_notes: Both frontend and server-side validation were implemented. The frontend shows an alert, and the backend rejects multi-dashboard requests as a security guard.
comment_summary: Developer implemented both frontend alert and server-side condition. Pushed to staging for review.
